items.name: 防空監視哨跡（聴音壕）
items.subcategory: 建造物（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 昭和16年（1941）設置。レンガ二重積み、壕の縁がラッパ状。県内約40ヶ所のうちの1つ。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (structure), the site of an air-defense watch post with a sound-detection trench, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 2004-05-20. It is located in Naganohara.

items.name: 板碑
items.subcategory: 石造物（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 高さ84cm、幅30cm。延文2年（1357）5月2日銘。阿弥陀三尊梵字刻。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (stone object), a flat stone stele, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located at Chūō Elementary School.

items.name: 瓦塔
items.subcategory: 考古資料（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 縦横約21cm、高さ約21cm。奈良〜平安時代の粘土焼成三重・五重塔。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (archaeological material), a clay pagoda, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located at Chūō Elementary School.

items.name: 桜岩地蔵堂境内の丁杭式観音
items.subcategory: 彫刻（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 六里ヶ原の三街道沿いに各1〜33番まで建てられた道しるべ観音。江戸時代造立。

en.name_romaji: Sakuraiwa Jizōdō Keidai no Chōkuishiki Kannon
en.name_en: Marker-Post Kannon in the Precincts of Sakuraiwa Jizō Hall
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (sculpture), a marker-post-style Kannon image, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located at Sakuraiwa Jizō Hall.

items.name: 六里ヶ原丁杭式基点観音
items.subcategory: 彫刻（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 丁杭式観音99体の基点。分去茶屋に建立。これを加え100体観音となる。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (sculpture), a marker-post-style base-point Kannon image, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located in the precincts of Sakuraiwa Jizō Hall.

items.name: 常林寺の梵鐘
items.subcategory: 工芸品（町指定重要文化財）
items.location: やんば天明泥流ミュージアム
items.description: 天明3年（1783）浅間山大噴火の泥流で吾妻川へ押し出され、明治43年に発見。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (craft object), a temple bell of Jōrin-ji, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located at the Yanba Tenmei Deiryū Museum.

items.name: 川原畑諏訪神社の宝篋印塔
items.subcategory: 石造物（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 文政12年（1829）信州高遠の石工による造立。笠の意匠が蓮の花を伏せた珍しい形。

en.name_en: Hōkyōin Pagoda of Kawarabata Suwa Shrine
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (stone object), a hōkyōin stone pagoda, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located at Kawarabata Suwa Shrine.

items.name: 仙峩滝不動堂の宝塔
items.subcategory: 石造物（町指定重要文化財）
items.description: 室町時代応永年間（1394〜1427頃）造立推定。中世の希少な石造物。

en.name_en: Treasure Pagoda of Sengataki Fudō Hall
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (stone object), a treasure pagoda of Sengataki Fudō hall, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located in Naganohara.

items.name: 桜岩地蔵尊
items.subcategory: 有形民俗文化財（町指定重要有形民俗文化財）
items.description: 寛延4年（1751）建立。地蔵尊をめぐる訴訟事件が記録されている。

en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible folk cultural property), a Jizō image, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated important tangible folk cultural property of Naganohara, designated on 1987-03-09. It is located at Sakuraiwa.

items.name: 海野長門守の墓碑（供養塔）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 総高2mの宝篋印塔。永禄9年（1566）吾妻郡代となり岩櫃城を守った海野長門守の墓。

en.description_en: This is a historic site, a gravestone and memorial tower of Unno Nagato-no-Kami, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located in Naganohara.

items.name: 羽根尾城
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 山頂周辺の山城。本丸・二の丸・三の丸。羽根尾氏の本拠。

en.description_en: This is a historic site, the site of Haneo Castle, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located at Mt. Jōhō.

items.name: 朝比奈三郎義秀の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 五輪塔。和田義盛の子、建保元年（1213）の和田合戦後この地で終わったと伝承。

en.description_en: This is a historic site, the grave of Asahina Saburō Yoshihide, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located in Naganohara.

items.name: 御塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 寛永2年（1625）村信方印の修験僧を葬った墓。即身成仏の塚と伝承。

en.description_en: This is a historic site, a burial mound, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located at the Urano family cemetery in Naganohara.

items.name: 長野原城跡（別名：箱岩城）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 長野原町街並み北側尾根
items.description: 東西約700mの細長い山城。本丸・出丸・箱岩出丸・物見台・水の手。戦国期の武田方守備城。

en.name_en: Ruins of Naganohara Castle (also known as Hakoiwa Castle)
en.description_en: This is a historic site, the ruins of Naganohara Castle, also known as Hakoiwa Castle, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 1990-03-27. It is located on the ridge north of the Naganohara townscape.

items.name: 狩宿関所跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 慶安4年（1651）真田氏が創設、寛文2年（1662）幕府公関に。「入鉄砲・出女」の詮議。

en.name_en: Site of the Karijuku Barrier Station
en.description_en: This is a historic site, the site of the Karijuku barrier station, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 1992-05-12. It is located near the grounds of Ōkuwa Elementary School.

items.name: 滝沢観音石仏群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 三原三十四番観音札所めぐりの結願所。約80体が安置。

en.name_en: Stone Buddha Group of Takizawa Kannon
en.description_en: This is a historic site, a group of stone Buddhist images, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated historic site of Naganohara, designated on 2019-03-22. It is located at the Takizawa Kannon hall, Naganohara.

items.name: 王城山神社の神杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 天然記念物（町指定天然記念物）
items.description: 胸高周4.64m、樹高36m、根元周5.1m、樹齢推定400年。

en.description_en: This is a natural monument, a sacred cedar tree, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated natural monument of Naganohara, designated on 1974-09-21. It is located at Ōjōyama Shrine in Hayashi.

items.name: 浅見家ヒイラギの巨樹
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 天然記念物（町指定天然記念物）
items.location: 長野原町浅見家旧屋敷跡
items.description: 胸高周2.52m、樹高8m、樹齢推定200年以上。

en.name_en: Giant Holly Tree of the Asami Family
en.description_en: This is a natural monument, a giant holly tree, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated natural monument of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located at the former Asami family residence site, Naganohara.

items.name: 御塚霊園境内のイタヤカエデ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 天然記念物（町指定天然記念物）
items.description: 胸高周3.70m、樹高32m、根元周5.30m、樹齢推定300年。

en.name_en: Painted Maple in the Precincts of Otsuka Cemetery Park
en.description_en: This is a natural monument, a painted maple (itayakaede) tree, located in Naganohara. It is a town-designated natural monument of Naganohara, designated on 1978-02-28. It is located at Otsuka Cemetery Park, Naganohara.
